title: Potion Effect Indicators
description: Potions now show a visual indicator of whether the effect has been strengthened or extended through brewing in the bottom left! Great for PvP and casual gameplay!
body:
Potions now show the whether the effect has been strengthened or extended through brewing in the bottom left of the texture! This applies to all potions, including splash potions, lingering potions and ominous bottles. The pack includes a potion drinking animation too! Great for PvP and casual gameplay!

![Textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d94dc06b16fd67a98a5b516726240b3868cfc17.png)

I means the potion effect is the default length (3 minutes) and the effect has not been strengthened or extended by brewing.

II means the potion effect has been strengthened by brewing the potion with a piece of glowstone dust (for example, Strength I becomes Strength II).

The + means the length of the potion effect has been extended by brewing the potion with a piece of redstone dust (for example, Strength I for 3 minutes becomes Strength II for 8 minutes).

[Please report any bugs to me on discord](https://discord.com/users/761775444516929538)

Thanks [Bluebird](https://modrinth.com/user/Bluebird) for letting me include the potion drinking animation from their [Eating Animation Resource Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/eating-animation-resource-pack)!

https://modrinth.com/user/Bluebird

https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/eating-animation-resource-pack
